page.title: Issue Templates
page.tagline: Manage reusable issue title and content templates.
page.search_placeholder: Search template name, title, or content...

empty.title: No issue templates yet
empty.description: Create a template to reuse title and content when creating issues.

list_error.title: Could not load issue templates
list_error.fallback: Something went wrong while loading issue templates.

create.title: New Issue Template
create.description: Templates only apply issue title and content.

detail.no_content: No content yet. Click the edit button to add issue content.

not_found.title: Issue template not found
not_found.fallback: This template may have been deleted, or you may not have access.

delete_dialog.title: Delete this issue template?
delete_dialog.description: This will permanently delete "{{name}}". Existing issues are not affected.
